insight_summary: More people are talking about Veterans right now. Lead with a clear opinion before the conversation gets crowded.

next_post.hook: I will say what a lot of Brits think about Veterans but will not post.
next_post.content_idea: Tell one short story that shows how Veterans shows up in pubs, schools, or family chats — keep it under 30 seconds before the punchline.
next_post.format: Yes/No debate post with comment-bait question overlay
next_post.reason_it_will_perform_better: This works because it taps into debate, which consistently drives strong engagement with your audience, and uses a debate format they respond to well.

data_integrity.policy: Only real Google Trends measurements are published. When Trends is unavailable, the last real reading is reused and flagged 'cached' with its measured_at time. No values are ever randomly generated.
